title: QuantAgent × VeighNa Capability Parity Registry

notes: Latest stable release at audit time
Official extension repositories are tracked per capability

knownCoverageGaps: Exact repository commit pins for independent vn.py extension repositories
Authenticated operator smoke runs for network providers and large-scale 100k/500k chart/data benchmarks

capabilities.name: EventEngine / typed event bus
capabilities.description: Threaded event dispatch, timer events, handler registration and lifecycle.
capabilities.gap: Current EventBroker covers API/web job events but not all market, order, trade, position, account, risk and artifact topics.
capabilities.adoption: Adapt the event contract and lifecycle; do not clone vn.py MainEngine.
capabilities.nextAction: Add durable sequence checkpoint and topic projections for artifact/risk events.

capabilities.name: MainEngine / application orchestration
capabilities.description: Canonical engine registry, gateway/app loading and lifecycle coordination.
capabilities.gap: ServiceContainer wires API services but there is no domain-wide registry for research, backtest, paper and execution lifecycle.
capabilities.adoption: Create a narrow QuantAgent ApplicationRegistry around existing canonical services; avoid a second business engine.
capabilities.nextAction: Define application registry interfaces and lifecycle ownership ADR.

capabilities.name: OMS / order-trade-position cache
capabilities.description: Standardized order, trade, position, account and contract state projections.
capabilities.gap: Persisted research/backtest objects exist, but one live/paper OMS projection and restart recovery contract is not verified.
capabilities.adoption: Unify existing order manager and paper state through adapters; do not bypass RiskGate.
capabilities.nextAction: Add paper OMS snapshot/reconciliation vertical slice.

capabilities.name: Standard trader objects
capabilities.description: Canonical contract, tick, bar, order, trade, position and account objects.
capabilities.gap: Schemas are split by pipeline/API and some runtime payloads remain arbitrary dictionaries.
capabilities.adoption: Create canonical domain models and explicit API adapters with schema migration.
capabilities.nextAction: Inventory duplicate order/trade/bar schemas and select canonical ownership.

capabilities.name: Gateway and App lifecycle
capabilities.description: Discoverable modules, connection lifecycle, status and safe shutdown.
capabilities.gap: No unified plugin capability detection and connection-state contract.
capabilities.adoption: Use plugin adapters for data, broker and optional domain modules; live remains disabled.
limitations: credentials and live access intentionally unavailable
capabilities.nextAction: Define plugin manifest and unavailable-state schema.

capabilities.name: Database and datafeed abstraction
capabilities.description: Database/datafeed interfaces for historical bars and ticks.
capabilities.gap: PIT data, provider jobs, Runtime catalog, coverage inspection and transfer workflows share one command surface; a generic third-party database plugin SPI is still not defined.
capabilities.adoption: Preserve QuantAgent PIT data as canonical and expose providers through allowlisted jobs rather than duplicating vn.py's Qt engine.
limitations: provider availability depends on installed packages and operator credentials
exchange-holiday coverage still delegates to the canonical trading calendar
capabilities.nextAction: Define the optional database/datafeed plugin SPI and run authenticated provider scale benchmarks.

capabilities.name: REST, WebSocket and RPC clients
capabilities.description: Command/request transport, real-time events, reconnect and process isolation.
capabilities.gap: REST and WebSocket exist; durable replay, authentication, backpressure and RPC process boundary remain incomplete.
capabilities.adoption: Keep REST commands and typed WebSocket events; add RPC only between isolated processes when justified.
capabilities.nextAction: Add sequence resume and missed-event recovery contract.

capabilities.name: Logging and notifications
capabilities.description: Structured logs and user notifications for operational events.
capabilities.gap: Logs are visible, but notification routing, severity policy and acknowledgement are not unified.
capabilities.adoption: Create notification adapters with safe configuration and no credentials in frontend.
capabilities.nextAction: Define notification event and adapter registry.

capabilities.name: Alpha dataset and processors
capabilities.description: Feature expressions, data processors and train/validation/test dataset workflow.
capabilities.gap: QuantAgent has richer PIT pipelines, but web-configurable processor graphs and a unified dataset registry are not complete.
capabilities.adoption: Map existing PIT-safe feature pipelines into a typed dataset experiment contract.
capabilities.nextAction: Add dataset artifact capabilities and build-dataset job form.

capabilities.name: Alpha158 compatibility
capabilities.description: Qlib-style 158 factor feature set.
capabilities.gap: Repository-wide factor-name and formula mapping has not been completed.
capabilities.adoption: Provide compatibility mapping only where factors are PIT-safe and semantically equivalent.
limitations: status intentionally not inferred from names
capabilities.nextAction: Run exact factor inventory and formula equivalence audit.

capabilities.name: WorldQuant Alpha101 compatibility
capabilities.description: WorldQuant Alpha101 feature dataset added in vn.py 4.3.
capabilities.gap: QuantAgent references multiple factor libraries, but exact implemented formulas and tests require audit.
capabilities.adoption: Register formula-level mappings; never mark compatible by filename alone.
capabilities.nextAction: Generate factor formula/source/test inventory.

capabilities.name: Model abstraction and evaluation
capabilities.description: Train/evaluate models and produce signals through a consistent workflow.
capabilities.gap: Existing model families are visible, but create/clone/run/cancel/resume experiment lifecycle is incomplete.
capabilities.adoption: Keep QuantAgent models and add a typed experiment service and acceptance gates.
capabilities.nextAction: Implement experiment schema and training job lifecycle.

capabilities.name: AlphaLab research workspace
capabilities.description: Interactive factor/model research workflow and signal-file management.
capabilities.gap: Analysis pages exist but cannot yet create and execute full experiments from the web.
capabilities.adoption: Merge into QuantAgent Factor/Model workspaces instead of adding a parallel AlphaLab.
capabilities.nextAction: Add factor evaluation experiment vertical slice.

capabilities.name: CTA strategy lifecycle
capabilities.description: Strategy discovery, parameterization, init/start/stop and state monitoring.
capabilities.gap: QuantAgent strategy logic is pipeline-oriented and lacks one lifecycle UI/API.
capabilities.adoption: Adapt lifecycle semantics while preserving target weights, OrderManager and RiskGate.
capabilities.nextAction: Inventory strategy entrypoints and define StrategyInstance schema.

capabilities.name: CTA Backtester workflow
capabilities.description: Configure, run, monitor and compare backtests with orders, trades and charts.
capabilities.gap: Result inspection is strong, but browser-side creation, parameter optimization and cancellation/reproduction are incomplete.
capabilities.adoption: Use vn.py workflow, never replace strict A-share execution semantics.
capabilities.nextAction: Implement typed backtest experiment form and job progress.

capabilities.name: Portfolio strategy lifecycle
capabilities.description: Multi-symbol strategy lifecycle and parameter optimization.
capabilities.gap: Portfolio construction exists but lifecycle and state projection are not unified.
capabilities.adoption: Wrap target-weight producers as strategy instances; retain strict execution boundary.
capabilities.nextAction: Define target-weight strategy adapter.

capabilities.name: Spread trading plugin boundary
capabilities.description: Synthetic spread definitions, algo execution and strategy workflow.
capabilities.gap: No current A-share spread module.
capabilities.adoption: Keep as optional plugin capability with unavailable state; do not pollute core.
capabilities.nextAction: Define optional plugin contract and not-installed UI state.

capabilities.name: Script Trader
capabilities.description: Interactive scripted access to engine functions and state.
capabilities.gap: Many scripts exist, but no governed script session with command allowlist and audit.
capabilities.adoption: Provide a restricted research command runner, never arbitrary shell execution.
capabilities.nextAction: Design allowlisted command palette and audit contract.

capabilities.name: Algo Trading (TWAP/VWAP/Iceberg/Sniper)
capabilities.description: Algorithmic execution templates with child orders and status.
capabilities.gap: A-share execution constraints exist, but algo scheduling and fill-quality workflow are absent.
capabilities.adoption: Implement paper/dry-run algorithms behind OrderManager and RiskGate.
capabilities.nextAction: Implement TWAP paper simulation vertical slice.

capabilities.name: Order management and conversion
capabilities.description: Order intents, conversion, active order control and cancellation.
capabilities.gap: Core logic exists; unified paper command API and real-time order monitor are incomplete.
capabilities.adoption: Expose canonical OrderManager through typed paper-only commands.
capabilities.nextAction: Add order monitor projection and paper command boundary.

capabilities.name: Paper Account
capabilities.description: Simulated matching, accounts, positions and restart recovery.
capabilities.gap: Paper capabilities exist in the repository but web account lifecycle and restart-state verification are incomplete.
capabilities.adoption: Use existing VirtualBroker/paper logic and add account lifecycle UI.
capabilities.nextAction: Audit current paper paths and build account start/status/stop slice.

capabilities.name: DataManager
capabilities.description: Overview, query, import/export, download, delete and data maintenance.
capabilities.gap: The requested import/export quarantine, exact duplicate/date coverage inspection, provider-specific TickFlow daily/minute forms, parsed provider progress, cancellation and Runtime refresh are implemented. Authenticated scale smoke runs remain operator-environment verification, not an absent product path.
capabilities.adoption: Extend the single Runtime/Data workspace, not a second data explorer.
limitations: real network execution requires explicit operator confirmation and provider credentials
business-day gap candidates require canonical exchange-calendar confirmation
100k/500k dataset browser and provider throughput baselines remain to be recorded
capabilities.nextAction: Run authenticated TickFlow/AkShare/TuShare smoke and scale benchmarks in the operator environment; retain fail-loud provider errors.

capabilities.name: DataRecorder
capabilities.description: Forward Tick/Level-2 subscription recording with configuration, progress, cancellation and logs.
capabilities.gap: TickFlow quote and Level-2 forward recording are implemented as bounded, cancellable jobs. A gateway-neutral tick/bar subscription engine and automatic restart policy are not yet generalized.
capabilities.adoption: Keep TickFlow recording provider-specific and manifest-backed; generalize only behind a typed recorder adapter so historical ticks are never fabricated.
evidence: TickFlow quote/depth scripts and Runtime output contracts
limitations: records forward snapshots only; does not invent historical trade ticks
restart recovery remains an operator/scheduler responsibility
capabilities.nextAction: Add a typed recorder adapter and persisted restart policy after an authenticated TickFlow operator smoke run.

capabilities.name: Portfolio Manager
capabilities.description: Portfolio grouping, holdings, PnL, fees, slippage and history.
capabilities.gap: Historical projections exist but multi-portfolio paper state, contribution and reconciliation UI are incomplete.
capabilities.adoption: Build one Portfolio workspace over canonical target weights, positions and paper state.
capabilities.nextAction: Implement portfolio snapshot API and dense monitor.

capabilities.name: Plugin-based RiskManager
capabilities.description: Discoverable rules, flow/order/cancel limits, interception logs and alerts.
capabilities.gap: Strong A-share rules exist, but plugin discovery, per-rule enable/config and real-time interception event projection are incomplete.
capabilities.adoption: Keep RiskGate canonical and add a rule registry/adapter layer.
capabilities.nextAction: Implement typed risk rule registry and paper interception events.

capabilities.name: Chart core
capabilities.description: High-performance history/realtime charts, cursor and linked items.
capabilities.gap: Wheel-only zoom, drag-only pan, keyboard navigation, explicit range actions, the overview slider and per-workspace viewport persistence are implemented for daily history and backtest equity. Minute/tick incremental realtime continuity and a certified 100k/500k browser performance baseline remain incomplete.
capabilities.adoption: Continue ECharts behind one Chart Adapter unless benchmarks prove inadequate.
tests: browser wheel, drag, keyboard and range-control verification
capabilities.nextAction: Add incremental minute/tick updates and certify 100k/500k point browser performance without changing the established interaction contract.

capabilities.name: ChartWizard workflow
capabilities.description: Multi-tab symbol charts with historical/realtime continuity.
capabilities.gap: Symbol/run linkage exists; multi-instance charts, realtime continuation and saved chart workspaces are incomplete.
capabilities.adoption: Extend Web workspace tabs and shared context rather than clone Qt tabs.
capabilities.nextAction: Add multiple chart workspace instances and shared symbol context.

capabilities.name: WebTrader process boundary
capabilities.description: Web command API, event push, connection state and multi-client service.
capabilities.gap: Web UI works, but auth, process isolation, replay/backpressure and multi-client state contracts are incomplete.
capabilities.adoption: Preserve separate Web/API process and keep computation in background jobs.
capabilities.nextAction: Add authenticated session boundary and durable event resume.

capabilities.name: RPC Service
capabilities.description: Process-isolated request and publish/subscribe RPC.
capabilities.gap: No verified internal RPC boundary between Web, jobs and paper/trading processes.
capabilities.adoption: Introduce only when process isolation requires it; keep typed schemas.
limitations: not currently required for read-only API
capabilities.nextAction: Write process-boundary ADR before implementation.

capabilities.name: OptionMaster plugin boundary
capabilities.description: Option chain, pricing, Greeks and portfolio tools.
capabilities.gap: Options are not a current QuantAgent core workflow.
capabilities.adoption: Keep a typed optional plugin boundary and explicit unavailable state.
limitations: requires option market data and domain models
capabilities.nextAction: Define extension manifest; no core implementation yet.

capabilities.name: App/plugin discovery
capabilities.description: Discover, load and report optional capabilities.
capabilities.gap: Frontend module registry exists but backend capability/plugin registry is not unified.
capabilities.adoption: Create one signed/typed plugin manifest registry shared by backend and UI.
capabilities.nextAction: Design canonical capability/plugin manifest after parity registry.
